rationale: Review 2's clean approve correctly judges the PR at the right generality (Bialgebra for mapValue, Hopf only for instGroup/instCommGroup, using exactly the required antipode axiom with no over/under-generalization). Review 1's requested addition of the symmetric `antipode_id_convMul` (unused in the diff, irrelevant to the functor-of-points construction or any theorem) is a needless symmetry edit; acting on it does not improve generality and produces a strictly worse merged PR than the approve.
